yaml.text:
learning_rate: 0.0001
weight_decay: 0.01
batch_size: 32
max_epochs: 10
seed: 42
gradient_accumulation_steps: 4
warmup_steps: 500

toml.text:
learning_rate = 0.0001
weight_decay = 0.01
batch_size = 32
max_epochs = 10
seed = 42
gradient_accumulation_steps = 4
warmup_steps = 500

yaml.text:
model:
  name: llama-3.1-8b
  hidden_size: 4096
  num_layers: 32
  num_heads: 32
  vocab_size: 128256
training:
  lr: 0.0001
  batch_size: 4
  epochs: 3
  warmup_ratio: 0.1
  weight_decay: 0.01
  scheduler: cosine
  gradient_checkpointing: true
data:
  dataset: alpaca
  max_length: 2048
  split_ratio: 0.9
  num_workers: 4

toml.text:
[model]
name = "llama-3.1-8b"
hidden_size = 4096
num_layers = 32
num_heads = 32
vocab_size = 128256

[training]
lr = 0.0001
batch_size = 4
epochs = 3
warmup_ratio = 0.1
weight_decay = 0.01
scheduler = "cosine"
gradient_checkpointing = true

[data]
dataset = "alpaca"
max_length = 2048
split_ratio = 0.9
num_workers = 4

yaml.text:
peft_type: LORA
r: 64
lora_alpha: 16
lora_dropout: 0.05
bias: none
target_modules: q_proj,k_proj,v_proj,o_proj,gate_proj,up_proj,down_proj
task_type: CAUSAL_LM
inference_mode: true

toml.text:
peft_type = "LORA"
r = 64
lora_alpha = 16
lora_dropout = 0.05
bias = "none"
target_modules = "q_proj,k_proj,v_proj,o_proj,gate_proj,up_proj,down_proj"
task_type = "CAUSAL_LM"
inference_mode = true
